description_long: This object is a compact, dark-colored firearm with a sleek, metallic finish and a classic, streamlined silhouette. The barrel is cylindrical and extends forward, with a visible muzzle opening at the front. The grip is ergonomically shaped, likely made of a different material or finish, and features a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly defined, with the guard forming a rounded protective loop around the trigger. The top of the object is flat and unadorned, with minimal external features or attachments. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A compact, dark metallic firearm with a smooth grip and a rounded trigger guard, featuring a streamlined, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The object is viewed directly from the front, showing the circular muzzle opening and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the barrel, the grip, the trigger, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the grip and the top of the slide, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the grip, barrel, trigger, and rounded trigger guard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
